SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF JUNYI CAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT W.J. GLOBAL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SWEET RUAN, MANAGER AND VICKY WU, AGENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS ARE ASSISTED BY THE COURT'S CANTONESE INTERPRETER JEFF DINN, WITH OATH ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAI, JUNYI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
